title: Ember Power Sector Emissions Yearly
description:
Get power sector emissions data at a yearly grain.
    e.g.

`https://api.ember-energy.org/v1/power-sector-emissions/yearly?entity=G20&series=Coal,Gas&start_date=2000&api_key=MY_API_KEY`
    

The methodology of this dataset can be found on its [dataset page](https://ember-energy.org/data/yearly-electricity-data/)
    within the 'Methodology - Ember Electricity Data' pdf.
